data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Session-level capacity controls', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for session-level capacity controls, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to this aspect. This indicates a clear gap in the saga lifecycle regarding the necessary validation of session-level capacity controls.
gaps: No evidence of session-level capacity controls.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement session-level capacity control checks
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that session bookings do not exceed defined capacity limits.
